prompt: A deadlines board grouping clients by urgency — filing deadline this week, this month, and later — with each client's document progress on their card.
wire:
<App name="Deadlines Board">
  <Query id="deadlines" tool="host_listDeadlines" input={{}}/>
  <Query id="dashboard" tool="host_getDashboard" input={{}}/>
  <Stack gap={6}>
    <Row gap={4}>
      <Text variant="heading" text="Deadlines Board"/>
      <CadenceMissingDocsHero missingCount={dashboard.clientsMissingDocuments} clientCount={dashboard.totalClients} badgeLabel="Missing docs"/>
    </Row>
  </Stack>
  <Island name="DeadlinesBoard">const TODAY = new Date("2026-07-21");

      function getWeekEnd() {
        const d = new Date(TODAY);
        const day = d.getDay();
        const diff = 7 - day;
        d.setDate(d.getDate() + diff);
        d.setHours(23, 59, 59, 999);
        return d;
      }

      function getMonthEnd() {
        return new Date(2026, 6, 31, 23, 59, 59, 999);
      }

      function daysUntil(isoDate) {
        const d = new Date(isoDate);
        const diff = d - TODAY;
        return Math.ceil(diff / (1000 * 60 * 60 * 24));
      }

      function urgencyLabel(days) {
        if (days < 0) return "Overdue";
        if (days === 0) return "Today";
        if (days === 1) return "Tomorrow";
        return `${days} days away`;
      }

      function urgencyVariant(days) {
        if (days < 0) return "overdue";
        if (days <= 7) return "missing";
        if (days <= 31) return "review";
        return "neutral";
      }

      function ClientCard({ client }) {
        const days = daysUntil(client.filingDeadline);
        const variant = urgencyVariant(days);
        const label = urgencyLabel(days);
        const received = client.documentsReceived ?? 0;
        const total = client.documentsTotal ?? 0;
        const pct = total > 0 ? received / total : 0;

        return (
          <Surface>
            <Stack gap={3}>
              <Row gap={2} style={{ justifyContent: "space-between", alignItems: "flex-start" }}>
                <Stack gap={1}>
                  <Text variant="heading" text={client.name}/>
                  <Text variant="caption" text={client.entityType ?? ""}/>
                </Stack>
                <EnumBadge value={client.status}/>
              </Row>

              <Row gap={2} style={{ alignItems: "center" }}>
                <Text variant="caption" text="Deadline:"/>
                <DateTime value={client.filingDeadline} mode="date"/>
                <Badge label={label} tone={variant === "overdue" ? "danger" : variant === "missing" ? "danger" : variant === "review" ? "accent" : "neutral"}/>
              </Row>

              <Stack gap={1}>
                <Row gap={2} style={{ justifyContent: "space-between" }}>
                  <Text variant="caption" text="Documents"/>
                  <Text variant="caption" text={`${received} of ${total}`}/>
                </Row>
                <Progress value={pct} showValue tone={pct === 1 ? "success" : days <= 7 ? "danger" : "default"}/>
              </Stack>

              {client.missingDocumentKinds && client.missingDocumentKinds.length > 0 && (
                <Stack gap={1}>
                  <Text variant="caption" text="Still missing:"/>
                  <Row gap={1} style={{ flexWrap: "wrap" }}>
                    {client.missingDocumentKinds.slice(0, 4).map((kind, i) => (
                      <Badge key={i} label={kind} tone="neutral"/>
                    ))}
                    {client.missingDocumentKinds.length > 4 && (
                      <Badge label={`+${client.missingDocumentKinds.length - 4} more`} tone="neutral"/>
                    )}
                  </Row>
                </Stack>
              )}

              {client.assignedStaff && (
                <Text variant="caption" text={`Assigned: ${client.assignedStaff}`}/>
              )}
            </Stack>
          </Surface>
        );
      }

      function Section({ title, clients, tone }) {
        if (!clients || clients.length === 0) return (
          <Stack gap={2}>
            <Text variant="heading" text={title}/>
            <Surface>
              <Text variant="caption" text="No clients in this group — nothing to chase here."/>
            </Surface>
          </Stack>
        );

        return (
          <Stack gap={3}>
            <Row gap={2} style={{ alignItems: "center" }}>
              <Text variant="heading" text={title}/>
              <Badge label={`${clients.length}`} tone={tone}/>
            </Row>
            <Grid columns={3}>
              {clients.map((c, i) => <ClientCard key={c.id ?? i} client={c}/>)}
            </Grid>
          </Stack>
        );
      }

      export default function DeadlinesBoard({ deadlines, dashboard }) {
        const rows = deadlines ?? [];
        const weekEnd = getWeekEnd();
        const monthEnd = getMonthEnd();

        const thisWeek = rows.filter(c => {
          const d = new Date(c.filingDeadline);
          return d <= weekEnd;
        });

        const thisMonth = rows.filter(c => {
          const d = new Date(c.filingDeadline);
          return d > weekEnd && d <= monthEnd;
        });

        const later = rows.filter(c => {
          const d = new Date(c.filingDeadline);
          return d > monthEnd;
        });

        return (
          <Stack gap={8}>
            <Section title="This week" clients={thisWeek} tone="danger"/>
            <Divider/>
            <Section title="This month" clients={thisMonth} tone="accent"/>
            <Divider/>
            <Section title="Later" clients={later} tone="neutral"/>
          </Stack>
        );
      }</Island>
</App>
